recent_excerpts: SideWinder APT targets South Asian government bodies with a phishing campaign using a fake Chrome PDF viewer and a cloned Zimbra login portal to steal webmail credentials, active since February 2026.
North Korean operatives are using AI tools and forged documents to pass remote job interviews, according to Flare research.
North Korean threat actor UNC1069 lures Web3 professionals with fake Zoom and Microsoft Teams meetings to deploy malware that steals cryptocurrency, according to new research.
